title: Agent Query Session (agent-query-session v2.0)
description: Structured session built from a query result, capturing resolved bundle provenance for agentic workflows.

resolved_bundles.description: Unique set of bundle/repo identifiers that contributed hits or were successfully queried.

hits_count.description: Number of hits present in the projected context bundle.

context_source.description: Indicates which data sources were used to build the session.

federation_bundle_count.description: Total number of bundles attempted in the federation query, or null for non-federated sessions.

federation_effective_count.description: Number of bundles that were effectively queried (not filtered or skipped), or null for non-federated sessions.

session_authority.description: Classifies this session as an agent context projection — not canonical repository content.

context_source.description: Top-level provenance classification of the context used to build this session.

artifact_refs.description: Runtime artifact IDs that were used to build this session. Null when the ID was not available at build time.

query_trace_id.description: Stable artifact store ID of the query_trace artifact for this session.

context_bundle_id.description: Stable artifact store ID of the context_bundle artifact for this session.

agent_query_session_id.description: Stable artifact store ID of this agent_query_session artifact when explicitly provided by a caller. Service responses keep this field null and expose the assigned store ID via artifact_ids.agent_query_session.

claim_boundaries.description: Explicit provenance boundary claims for this session.

does_not_prove.description: What this session explicitly does not prove.
